context: Tests whether the agent correctly implements a quick view trigger button on a product card component, including hover/touch visibility, accessibility attributes, and CSS animation conventions from the skill.

checklist.name: Button added to image wrapper
checklist.description: ProductCard.jsx contains a button element inside or overlaying the product image wrapper area

checklist.name: onClick calls onQuickView with product ID
checklist.description: The button's onClick handler calls onQuickView (or equivalent prop) passing the product's ID

checklist.name: Descriptive aria-label on button
checklist.description: The quick view button has an aria-label that includes the product name (e.g. aria-label containing both 'quick view' and the product name, case-insensitive)

checklist.name: Image wrapper is position: relative
checklist.description: ProductCard.css sets position: relative on the image wrapper element so the absolutely-positioned button can overlay it

checklist.name: Button positioned absolutely over image
checklist.description: ProductCard.css positions the quick view button absolutely (position: absolute) within the image wrapper

checklist.name: Button hidden by default (opacity: 0)
checklist.description: ProductCard.css sets the button's default opacity to 0 so it is hidden when the card is not hovered

checklist.name: Hover reveals button
checklist.description: ProductCard.css sets opacity: 1 on the quick view button when the product card (or image wrapper) is hovered or has focus-within

checklist.name: Hover slide-up animation
checklist.description: ProductCard.css uses a translateY transition (e.g. from translateY(8px) to translateY(0)) as part of the hover reveal animation

checklist.name: Always visible on touch devices
checklist.description: ProductCard.css includes a @media (hover: none) rule that sets the quick view button to opacity: 1 and its full visible transform, making it permanently visible on touch/no-hover devices

checklist.name: Opacity + transform transition declared
checklist.description: ProductCard.css declares a CSS transition on the quick view button covering both opacity and transform properties

checklist.name: Image anchor aria-hidden
checklist.description: ProductCard.jsx sets aria-hidden="true" and/or tabIndex={-1} on the image anchor element to avoid redundant navigation links for screen readers
